name: sulis-execution
description: Work Package Executor — three-layer architecture (per v0.9.0) plus plan-mode-style Step 1.5 plan generation (v0.10.0+). (1) deterministic CLI tool library (wpx-* scripts) handles all bookkeeping including the new wpx-journal seed-plan / mark-plan-item / add-plan-item subcommands; (2) executor agent owns Steps 1-7 (worktree → Step 1.5 plan generation → Red-Green-Blue → docs → lint → commit → push) and delegates bookkeeping to wpx-* tools; (3) calling session owns Steps 8-12 via wpx-pipeline background Bash, security-reviewer Agent spawn, and wpx-step12 atomic wrap. The Step 1.5 plan is the executor's pre-execution audit surface — it reads the WP file + TDD + ADRs, derives an approach summary + structured item list (one row per test, implementation target, conditional refactor, docs, lint, commit), writes to the journal's new ## Plan section, then works through items by marking pending → in-progress → done during Steps 2-7. Scope-guard fires at Step 1.5 if any plan item references files outside the WP Contract — catching scope drift before substantive work begins. Self-heals in-scope failures via OODA + Five Whys per executor-loop-standard.md; escalates out-of-scope failures via structured BLOCKER records. Follows git-workflow-standard.md (direct merge to dev, no PR ceremony). Composes with CP-01..CP-05, AAF-01..AAF-09, EP-02/03/07, RGB-01..03.
